name: Jiangsu Kuangshun Photosensitivity New-Material Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Kuangshun Photosensitivity New-Material Stock Co., Ltd. develops and produces photosensitive materials in China. It offers liquid photosensitive solder resist ink, UV-curable tag printing ink, heat curing marking ink, photosensitive circuit ink, UV curing acid resistant and anti-etching ink, water-based ink, and glass ink. The company is headquartered in Jiangyin, China.
